_comment: Pre-built pmapper-style IAM graph for the Meridian Financial escalation scenario. Committed as seed data — no real credentials.
_format: Simplified pmapper graph JSON. Nodes = principals, edges = permission-composition relationships.

edges.reason: dev-alice has sts:AssumeRole on MeridianLambdaRole and is listed in its trust policy

MeridianLambdaRole has iam:PassRole/* and lambda:UpdateFunctionConfiguration/*. An attacker can update an existing Lambda's execution role to MeridianAdminRole, then invoke the Lambda to execute as admin.

hops.note: Direct trust — dev-alice is an explicit principal in the trust policy
Update a Lambda's execution role to MeridianAdminRole; invocation then runs as admin

minimum_cut_set.description: Remove the dev-alice principal from MeridianLambdaRole's trust policy, OR scope iam:PassRole on MeridianLambdaRole to only pass MeridianLambdaRole itself (not MeridianAdminRole).

cheapest_fix.result: MeridianLambdaRole can no longer pass MeridianAdminRole to a Lambda function — edge 2 is broken.
